## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves project management, client-facing work, and AI/technical feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [GrowthX is growing rapidly, facing challenges with standardization and capacity](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Candidate (Callie) has strong content, AI, and project management background](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Company uses Airtable for project tracking, Linear for engineering tasks](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Core part of client-facing delivery team](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Managing editor leads pods with content managers and account strategists](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [Project management for client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Content editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Client communication and meeting management](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Providing feedback on AI platform to engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Company Status and Challenges

  - [Rapid growth with high client interest from webinars](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Recently paused hiring to catch up with client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [Standardizing processes across differently-trained pods](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Balancing workloads during vacation periods](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [Matching team members' skills (editorial, technical, project management) within pods](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

### Candidate Background (Callie)

  - [20+ years in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Recent experience:](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [VP of Marketing for commercial real estate association](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Rebuilt marketing from ground up, including team building](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Implemented AI tools for content production during COVID](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Automated marketing processes and campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Current consulting work includes AI project for Microsoft](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Strong project management background with various tools (Asana, Monday, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### AI Insights

  - [Callie's perspective: AI requires human expertise to be effective](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Importance of providing context and guidance to AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Need for refinement and iteration in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Team Structure and Workload

  - [Pods consist of managing editors, content managers, and account strategists](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Currently at capacity with client workload](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Hiring 2-3 new Technical Managing Editors](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [No perfect system for monitoring workloads; mix of self-reporting and management oversight](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Maria to follow up regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue evaluating hiring needs based on incoming client deals](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Potential implementation of a system to better track team capacity and workloads](https://fathom.video/share/pGypa5QhW4z8Js-7yWzsFGGGcz4V6Grs?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
